sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21068" key="broulloku/peros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρουλλοκύπερος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύπερος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.132</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
